title: Wood furniture gate — L-sofa ≤30k · bedroom ≤80k · كونتر OK · no MDF · same-day stock

fromProject: Warm contemporary cozy nest (not cold clinic minimal)
Stable / decades-minded — dual gate function + aesthetics
Carpet direction: deeper tones (terracotta, olive, navy) — avoid pure cream large surfaces
Prefer quiet minimal lines over ornate classic Damietta carving

sofa.structure: hardwood frame preferred; structural plywood (كونتر) OK on non-critical boxes; NO MDF

bedroom.structure: خشب كونتر (plywood) OK · solid beech better if found · NO MDF

forbidden: foil-only fake wood with board core for carcass

marketTruth.summary: With كونتر allowed and ceilings at 30k (L-sofa) / 80k (bedroom), the brief is realistic. MDF still banned. Same-day stock only. 30k opens better hardwood-frame L options; 80k reaches top plywood sets and the lower end of new solid-beech full bedrooms.

bedroomMaterialBandsEGP_2026.source: Furniture Hub Damietta bedroom catalog guide 2026
bedroomMaterialBandsEGP_2026.solid_beech_luxury_long_life: 70,000–120,000 — now partly in range (target 70–80k floor stock promos)

sofaReality.under30k: Sweet spot for many showroom L sofas claiming beech/natural wood frame. Still inspect — ads lie. 25–30k is where better foam + denser frames appear more often than 15k mystery deals.
sofaReality.homzmart_beech_L_listings: Often 25–35k; only buy if branch confirms floor stock same day.
sofaReality.decades_class_L: Hardwood frame + good foam under 30k is plausible with inspection; full solid showpiece L still often higher.

marketTruth.sameDayRule: Only buy what is physically on the showroom floor or warehouse today. Call before you leave. ‘Ready in 2–3 weeks’ = automatic reject.

rejectImmediately: MDF / أم دي أف / particleboard / حبيبي as structure or seat box
Cannot show the frame under fabric
Only ‘natural wood look’ laminate on board
Seller refuses wood type on invoice
passChecksInShowroom: Frame rails: hardwood (زان) preferred — continuous members
Seat/side boxes: solid OR multi-ply كونتر OK — not crumbly MDF edges
Knock test: solid thud vs hollow paper board
Joints: screws + glue + corner blocks; no edge wobble
Legs: solid wood or quality metal bolted through
Weight: too light is a red flag
bedroomPassChecks: Bed rails: solid wood or thick كونتر with solid reinforcement — no MDF rails
Wardrobe carcass: كونتر OK and preferred under 80k; solid beech if promo ≤80k
Drawers: plywood or solid sides — reject MDF drawer boxes
Finish: even lacquer; no peeling foil
sellerPrestigeSignals: Damietta factory + Cairo/Giza/October showroom floor stock
Reviews about durability not only price
Wood type written on invoice (زان / كونتر)
Avoid anonymous Facebook-only sellers with no address

sameDayPickupMap.note: 6th of October / Sheikh Zayed / Mall of Egypt belt is practical. Call morning-of.
sameDayPickupMap.callScriptAr: عندكم ركنة L جاهزة للاستلام النهاردة؟ الهيكل خشب زان أو كونتر — مش MDF؟ وغرفة نوم 180 كونتر أو زان تحت 80 ألف جاهزة في المعرض؟

routes.name: Damietta brands — Greater Cairo showrooms
routes.how: Call for floor-stock L ≤30k and bedroom 180 كونتر/زان ≤80k. Visit only confirmed halls.
examplesToCall: Furniture Hub / Damietta-linked retailers (verify floor stock, not MTO catalog)
October City & Sheikh Zayed furniture showrooms

routes.name: 6th of October furniture strips
routes.how: Same-day logistics home; apply quality gate strictly
routes.fit: Best pickup path to your apartment

routes.name: Used solid beech (optional now)
routes.how: Less critical with 80k new كونتر/beech range — still useful for heirloom beech under budget

sofaStrategy.verdict: 30k is a workable ceiling for a minimal L with hardwood frame + كونتر boxes if needed. Still no remote ‘guaranteed decades’ SKU — floor inspect. Prefer 22–30k stock over 12k mystery deals.
recommendedApproach: Hard max 30k; target quality mid-upper of that band
Hardwood frame required; كونتر seat box acceptable if thick multi-ply
Measure living 375×450 — chaise clearance ≥70–80 cm walkway

candidates.name: Showroom L-sofa — hardwood frame, ≤30k, same-day floor stock
candidates.materialClaim: Hardwood (زان) frame; كونتر OK on boxes; no MDF
candidates.prestige: Prefer named Damietta workshop on invoice
pros: Budget now matches real mid-quality L stock
Room for better foam than ultra-cheap ads
كونتر boxes OK so fewer false rejects
cons: Must still inspect frame
Fabric may be average (reupholster later if frame is right)
candidates.buyScript: ركنة L جاهزة النهاردة؟ الهيكل زان؟ أي كونتر مش MDF؟ تحت 30 ألف؟

candidates.name: Retail ‘خشب زان’ L listings ~25–30k (Homzmart-class / similar)
candidates.priceNote: Often listed ~25–35k — only if ≤30k AND in stock
candidates.materialClaim: Seller claims beech — verify in branch
pros: Often photographed online for style pre-filter
cons: Many are MTO — reject if not floor stock
Material claims inflated

candidates.name: Mystery L 10–18k ‘زان’ no showroom
cons: Usually fails decades + material honesty

candidates.name: Any L with MDF structure
cons: Hard fail

candidates.name: Custom L — multi-week manufacture
cons: Fails same-day rule

bedroomStrategy.verdict: 80k + كونتر OK is the right band. Primary buy: modern minimal full set in structural plywood 50–75k. Stretch 70–80k if a simple solid-beech or beech-heavy set is on the floor same day.
recommendedApproach: Default: full كونتر modern bedroom 180, no MDF drawers, ≤80k
Upgrade if found same day: solid beech or beech+كونتر hybrid ≤80k
Minimal flat fronts; warm wood or soft matte — not gold classic

candidates.name: Modern full bedroom — structural كونتر, no MDF, ≤80k
candidates.materialClaim: خشب كونتر structure throughout (or كونتر + solid accents)
candidates.style: minimal modern, warm wood / soft grey
candidates.prestige: Standard strong Damietta mid-high tier when factory is real
pros: Fits budget with room for better hardware/finish
cons: Not full solid beech heirloom
Still reject any MDF inside drawers
candidates.buyScript: غرفة 180 كونتر جاهزة النهاردة؟ من غير MDF؟ تحت 80 ألف؟

candidates.name: New solid beech / beech-heavy modern set on promo ≤80k
candidates.priceNote: Lower edge of beech band 70–120k — only if floor stock ≤80k
pros: Closest to decades solid-wood ambition inside new budget
cons: May not be in stock same day
Many beech sets still price above 80k

candidates.name: Hybrid: solid 180 bed + nightstands + كونتر wardrobe
candidates.priceNote: Assemble from floor pieces same day if packages miss
cons: Finish matching takes care

candidates.name: Used solid beech set (optional with higher budget)
candidates.priceNote: Less necessary now; still valid if style fits minimal
pros: Can be true heirloom wood under 80k easily
cons: Condition risk; style may be classic-heavy

candidates.name: MDF modern packages (still reject)
cons: Fails no-MDF rule even under budget

dayPlan: Morning calls: L ≤30k hardwood/كونتر floor stock + bedroom 180 كونتر or زان ≤80k ready today
Visit sofa first — harder quality gate
Apply checklist; invoice must name زان and/or كونتر
Bedroom second — prefer complete كونتر set 50–75k or beech ≤80k if on floor
Arrange same-day truck; measure elevator for L pieces

fitChecks.living_375x450: L chaise on long wall; walk ≥70–80 cm
fitChecks.bedroom_330x475: 180 bed + nightstands; wardrobe on free wall

shoppingRoute: كونتر is approved — do not reject good plywood structure
Still zero MDF on carcass, drawers, or sofa seat boxes
Sofa ceiling 30k — hunt 22–30k stock, not 12k ads
Bedroom ceiling 80k — primary كونتر full set; secondary beech if ≤80k floor stock
Write material on invoice before paying
